languages.text: Военная служба на династию становится настоящим шансом для черни. Хотя платить за такую честь приходилось дорогой ценой, авторитет полка только рос, и спустя десятки лет армия династии фон Валанциус стала образцовым "кулаком Империума" для всего Простора Коронус.

Der Dienst in der Armee der Dynastie bot einfachen Leuten eine einzigartige Möglichkeit. Obwohl diese Ehre einen hohen Preis hatte, erhöhte sich das Ansehen des Regiments weiter und wenige Jahrzehnte später war die Armee der Dynastie derer von Valancius für die gesamte Koronus-Ausdehnung eine beispielhafte 'Faust des Imperiums'.
languages.original_text: Serving in the dynasty's military forces became a genuine opportunity for the common people. Although such an honour came at a high price, the prestige of the regiment only increased, and within decades the army of the von Valancius dynasty would become a model "fist of the Imperium" for the entire Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: Der Dienst in der Armee der Dynastie bot einfachen Leuten eine einzigartige Möglichkeit. Obwohl diese Ehre einen hohen Preis hatte, erhöhte sich das Ansehen des Regiments weiter und wenige Jahrzehnte später war die Armee der Dynastie derer von Valancius für die gesamte Koronus-Ausdehnung eine beispielhafte 'Faust des Imperiums'.

Serving in the dynasty's military forces became a genuine opportunity for the common people. Although such an honour came at a high price, the prestige of the regiment only increased, and within decades the army of the von Valancius dynasty would become a model "fist of the Imperium" for the entire Koronus Expanse.

Serving in the dynasty's military forces became a genuine opportunity for the common people. Although such an honour came at a high price, the prestige of the regiment only increased, and within decades the army of the von Valancius dynasty would become a model "fist of the Imperium" for the entire Koronus Expanse.

languages.text: ヴァランシウス家の軍隊は、庶民にとって真の機会となりました。この栄誉は高額な代償を伴いましたが、その軍団の威信は高まり、数十年後にはヴァランシウス家の軍隊は、コロナス・エクスパンション全体にわたって「帝国の拳」のモデルとなりました。
languages.original_text: Serving in the dynasty's military forces became a genuine opportunity for the common people. Although such an honour came at a high price, the prestige of the regiment only increased, and within decades the army of the von Valancius dynasty would become a model "fist of the Imperium" for the entire Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: ヴァランシウス家の軍隊は、庶民にとって真の機会となりました。この栄誉は高額な代償を伴いましたが、その軍団の威信は高まり、数十年後にはヴァランシウス家の軍隊は、コロナス・エクスパンション全体にわたって「帝国の拳」のモデルとなりました。

languages.text: 在王朝军队中服役，成为了平民们真正的翻身机会。虽然这份荣誉代价高昂，军团的声望却与日俱增。不过数十年光景，冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的军队就成了整个科罗努斯扩区公认的“帝国之拳”典范。
languages.original_text: Serving in the dynasty's military forces became a genuine opportunity for the common people. Although such an honour came at a high price, the prestige of the regiment only increased, and within decades the army of the von Valancius dynasty would become a model "fist of the Imperium" for the entire Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: 在王朝军队中服役，成为了平民们真正的翻身机会。虽然这份荣誉代价高昂，军团的声望却与日俱增。不过数十年光景，冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的军队就成了整个科罗努斯扩区公认的“帝国之拳”典范。

languages.text: Hanedanlığın askerî kuvvetlerinde hizmet etmek, avam için gerçek bir fırsata dönüştü. Böyle bir onurun bedeli ağır olsa da alayın prestiji giderek arttı ve on yıllar içinde von Valancius hanedanlığının ordusu, tüm Koronus Enginliği için örnek teşkil eden bir "İmparatorluk yumruğu" hâline geldi.
languages.original_text: Serving in the dynasty's military forces became a genuine opportunity for the common people. Although such an honour came at a high price, the prestige of the regiment only increased, and within decades the army of the von Valancius dynasty would become a model "fist of the Imperium" for the entire Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: Hanedanlığın askerî kuvvetlerinde hizmet etmek, avam için gerçek bir fırsata dönüştü. Böyle bir onurun bedeli ağır olsa da alayın prestiji giderek arttı ve on yıllar içinde von Valancius hanedanlığının ordusu, tüm Koronus Enginliği için örnek teşkil eden bir "İmparatorluk yumruğu" hâline geldi.

languages.text: Servir en las fuerzas armadas de la dinastía se convirtió en una oportunidad real para la gente corriente. Aunque el precio de semejante honor era muy elevado, el prestigio del regimiento fue en aumento y, en pocas décadas, el ejército de la casa von Valancius fue un «puño del Imperium» modélico para el resto de la Extensión de Koronus.
languages.original_text: Serving in the dynasty's military forces became a genuine opportunity for the common people. Although such an honour came at a high price, the prestige of the regiment only increased, and within decades the army of the von Valancius dynasty would become a model "fist of the Imperium" for the entire Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: Servir en las fuerzas armadas de la dinastía se convirtió en una oportunidad real para la gente corriente. Aunque el precio de semejante honor era muy elevado, el prestigio del regimiento fue en aumento y, en pocas décadas, el ejército de la casa von Valancius fue un «puño del Imperium» modélico para el resto de la Extensión de Koronus.

languages.text: Servir dans l'armée de la dynastie devint une véritable chance pour le peuple. Bien qu'un tel honneur ait un prix, le prestige du régiment ne fit que croître, et en quelques décennies à peine, l'armée de la dynastie von Valancius devint un modèle du « poing de l'Imperium » dans toutes les Étendues de Koronus.
languages.original_text: Serving in the dynasty's military forces became a genuine opportunity for the common people. Although such an honour came at a high price, the prestige of the regiment only increased, and within decades the army of the von Valancius dynasty would become a model "fist of the Imperium" for the entire Koronus Expanse.
